# Stratechery Plus + Asianometry

Stratechery Plus + Asianometry
******************************

( https://stratechery.com/2025/stratechery-plus-asianometry/?access_token=eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6InN0cmF0ZWNoZXJ5LnBhc3Nwb3J0Lm9ubGluZSIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..mAEXLu6Snjaj2WvZfHKU2WC-G1F-bRMkDmfU65DY_tJVDdX29hAZUjb40Obh1nlsG4nPW4ErPw7trUgVbll7j4DIriaCMegKENlQCSbjORVIa_oJXS4NCBe-Ai56KYcy7n9Q9bLUDOKggMCBSXwyunGx8nENPfAqBS9AjqipyijoGGOmAtYZcFRY5Iu0XWVp-dbuZl9LF3Fw0hvd7gtCs7eMxK08Y9SVG8f83GaCvzZZP_yAdbnfdtwJx6y5ijMcrMUyGK6etpbBxcmDQBfsr4PE_dTe8UmyRKmNhti7kXFx1iR8I8v-Ax-GYCDOXB0qmuJ2F6PbX2rHzs_jk2xKow ) Monday, January 20, 2025

Listen to this Update in your podcast player ( https://stratechery.passport.online/member/podcast?url=https%3A%2F%2Frss.stratechery.passport.online%2Ffeed%2Fpodcast%2FLngwKMpBW6eyZWYuWj4od3 )

Back in 2022 ( https://stratechery.com/2022/sharp-tech-and-stratechery-plus/?access_token=eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6InN0cmF0ZWNoZXJ5LnBhc3Nwb3J0Lm9ubGluZSIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..Z9jqlvF-TtWYgGNoRraDNqEAamywaScezQcJwt4UlzvSXWTMDF3Svk3zkQMCSaE4wNOWUsmVJdWvegWtLjoZixhAAld581CbduYcqJwzk98CrFICq6hyIrROdmQs0gDUTS6c4u6skkzAHWbFSqlmbmacAuK9WdFqfFBr1nQuHVHXf5CJiUsFe5SqfPP3-qfvNVxrWf-O6YeUl32iwLnoRljtmJOUqaoGnkFzKCeEkNC9skX7KABcP-Q6Wu20tqmAcoMq9OR7IuQyrHxLlzvQh1vUjFUd41QzVfjMq5DVMbyfICPTy6dkUEcLkwoWdU-UvHerPV5OB3aaOlUCIOFJhw ) , I rebranded a Stratechery subscription as Stratechery Plus, a bundle of content that would enhance the value of your subscription; today the bundle includes:

* The Stratechery Update ( https://stratechery.com/category/daily-email/?access_token=eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6InN0cmF0ZWNoZXJ5LnBhc3Nwb3J0Lm9ubGluZSIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..vXYTjtIxlm2pnA0XfYj8gBF37p8m5Ezn6vQqoM3AYcSYpLjQknOOJZGVpYkCixI2CrWRly4bmkR1Ebw0S1V1Rj__NRsoCR-8hveheX4qRSP0HnAivThqxW5ZxE50D80cFngMMQ19a_u65p_cizfBQYnUqvufGhj8JLhOIl_0Pnb58Cb7GPtlFBDO9TBidrxEqSWhpWBs7r3O-vHvmoS-LulMdXPLaI6Hez1injztLyxtUfuOVgX-4jVu4tNsKq3ojGlJZOTf_qK3v_3lL765zTp3jy-fXY6NAjG28nMJMjfon9c7o_Rnga2YNQ-42E22EVsveEoNZsRYabJwjGYCwg )
* The Stratechery Interview ( https://stratechery.com/topic/events/interview/?access_token=eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6InN0cmF0ZWNoZXJ5LnBhc3Nwb3J0Lm9ubGluZSIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..Fd17XWAs5wPb92_Gpm7x1H1pXvGSFe2VPD9F9CZ1hAhDqHeB3K_1LhKwp-Z0yPQnC2Aj-8T4yQv4lAKNbwFqjtCHj8YqLgcZwRT-RpbLWhtlwEW2o5zBfqHPO5l8z5l9kGwks2B4JBnsIoNUV09d2bKPj9D2AwYlKKFVnBuP2fx48txsxvRbHh898T686JqQ2kIfcyG4PRB9LdiX1bBgRWp8kv78AQ-uMrglIe_LMIraRdwjULR9dEBnp-FHb4DFKOCUHtIC18ZNB7O2FEAhHeWdo0xzjQm8Qn_Y-Xi5ga9NgUggTfONO1COQI4By1QANRHzn0B5rK2F0_tysZkxkg ) series
* The Sharp Tech with Ben Thompson ( https://sharptech.fm/member ) podcast, hosted by Andrew Sharp
* The Sharp China with Bill Bishop ( https://sharpchina.fm/member ) podcast, hosted by Andrew Sharp
* The Dithering ( https://dithering.fm/ ) podcast, with John Gruber ( https://daringfireball.net/ ) and myself
* The Greatest of All Talk ( https://goat.passport.online/member ) podcast, with Ben Golliver and Andrew Sharp

Today I am excited to announce a new addition: the Asianometry ( https://asianometry.passport.online/member/ ) newsletter and podcast, by Jon Yu.

Asianometry is one of the best tech YouTube channels in existence ( https://www.youtube.com/@Asianometry ) , with over 768,000 subscribers. Jon produces in-depth videos explaining every aspect of technology, with a particular expertise in semiconductors. To give you an idea of Jon's depth, he has made 31 videos about TSMC alone ( https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLKtxx9TnH76SRC7ZbOu2Nsg5mC72fy-GZ ). His semiconductor course ( https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLKtxx9TnH76QY5FjmO3NaUkVJvTPN9Vmg ) includes 30 videos covering everything from designing chips ( https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ihz2WY-E2C8&list=PLKtxx9TnH76QY5FjmO3NaUkVJvTPN9Vmg&index=2&pp=iAQB ) to how ASML builds EUV machines ( https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jJIO7aRXUCg&list=PLKtxx9TnH76QY5FjmO3NaUkVJvTPN9Vmg&index=4&pp=iAQB ) to Moore's Law ( https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nRJgvX6P8dI&list=PLKtxx9TnH76QY5FjmO3NaUkVJvTPN9Vmg&index=20&pp=iAQB ). His video on the end of Dennard's Law is a particular standout:

( https://www.youtube.com/embed/7p8ZeSbblec?si=7lsVdhKiD0Nu9QRe )

Jon is about more than semiconductors though: he's made videos about other tech topics like The Tragedy of Compaq ( https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=47ovT_hYlt8&list=PLKtxx9TnH76RKmJlFIfs7NumNp1RPNIQv&index=4&pp=iAQB ) , and non-tech topics like Japanese Whisky ( https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=19l7WkkwYi8&list=PLKtxx9TnH76RKmJlFIfs7NumNp1RPNIQv&index=5&pp=iAQB ) and Taiwan convenience stores ( https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vKBY-MJFJ4A&list=PLKtxx9TnH76RKmJlFIfs7NumNp1RPNIQv&index=6&pp=iAQB ). In short, Jon is an intensely curious person who does his research, and we are blessed that he puts in the work to share what he learns.

I am blessed most of all, however. Over the last year Jon has been making Stratechery Articles into video essays ( https://www.youtube.com/@Stratechery ) and cutting clips for Sharp Tech ( https://www.youtube.com/@SharpTechPodcast ) ; he did a great job with one of my favorite articles of 2024:

( https://www.youtube.com/embed/3cgjWHzFdj4?si=wzdTd1X144pDIwcJ )

And now, starting today, Stratechery Plus subscribers can get exclusive access to Asianometry's content in newsletter and podcast form. The Asianometry YouTube Channel ( https://www.youtube.com/@Asianometry ) will remain free and Jon's primary focus, but from now on all of his content will be simultaneously released as a transcript and podcast. Stratechery Plus subscribers can head over to the new Asianometry Passport site ( https://asianometry.passport.online/member/ ) to subscribe to his emails, or to add the podcast feed to your favorite podcast player.

And, of course, subscribe to Jon's YouTube channel ( https://www.youtube.com/@Asianometry/ ) , along with Stratechery Plus ( https://stratechery.passport.online/member/plan/4ycW4SE71Cy6ryrijywbTG ).

Listen to this update and other Stratechery Plus content in your podcast player:
